mapper.sql: id, title, category_id, category_name, summary, content, cover_image, author, is_top, status, view_count, publish_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, category_id, category_name, summary, content, cover_image, author, is_top, status, view_count, publish_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{author}, #{isTop}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{publishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title=#{title}, category_id=#{categoryId}, category_name=#{categoryName}, summary=#{summary}, content=#{content}, cover_image=#{coverImage}, author=#{author}, is_top=#{isTop}, status=#{status}, publish_time=#{publishTime}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE article SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
UPDATE article SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET is_top = #{isTop} WHERE id = #{id}
